summary: Final Game state 'CANCELLED' Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND Hide Spoilers is set to ON

steps.action: WHEN a completed game has any of the following statusCode values: CR,CS,CG,CV,CF,CC,CD,CB,CP,CL,CE,CA,CO,CI
steps.result: THEN 'CANCELLED' is not displayed in the game tile
